description: General policy question fully answerable from KB

chunks.content: Returns are accepted within 30 days of delivery for unworn items with original tags attached. Customers can start a return from their order page in the account dashboard.

inputs.customerMessage: Hi, what's your return policy? I bought a sweater two weeks ago and it doesn't fit.

mustDo: Confirm the 30-day return window covers the customer's 2-week-old purchase
Mention that items must be unworn with tags attached
Point the customer to the account dashboard / order page as the next step
mustAvoid: Claim a return has been started or processed on the customer's behalf
Invent a tracking number, refund timeline, or return label
Suggest the customer contact a different channel
rubric.toneNote: Friendly and direct, not saccharine or overly apologetic
